title: Blade Boost
description: BladeBoost is a performance-enhancing maod pack that ensures smoother gameplay and less lag. Subtle PvP enhancements make for smooth combat, perfect for the player who looks for efficiency and balance in exploring, building, or battle.
body: BladeBoost is a lightweight modpack, tailored to optimize your Minecraft performance while retaining touches of PvP elements for combat enthusiasts. Developed with optimization at its very core, it provides seamless gameplay, reduced lag and responsiveness. Whether you would like to build huge creations, explore vast worlds or strategize battles, you will have a seamless time. Its compatibility with most servers and worlds makes it an ideal choice for players who value performance without compromising fun. Play smarter, faster, and better with BladeBoost!
